creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've updated the port ja-man-doc-2.2(japanese/man-doc).

	Current modifications is

		(1) Suitable for changing from installation with
		    japanese man packed tarball to install from CVS
		    repository.

	Delete, Update and Add files are respecively
	
	[Update]:
		Makefile
		pkg/COMMENT
		pkg/DESCR
		pkg/MESSAGE
				
	[Delete]:
		files/
		files/md5
		files/install-man.tmpl

	[Add]:
		patches/
		patches/patch-aa
		patches/patch-ab
		pkg/PLIST

	I put the diff from ports-current(japanese/man-doc) in "Fix:".
